goal: UR10 cuRobo TWO-cube static-pickup pick-place. Extends CP-78/79 pedestal pattern to cuRobo handler — both cubes on pedestals, both delivered to bin sequentially. Validates raycast→FixedJoint workaround in cuRobo handler scales to multi-cube SOURCE_PATHS.
thoughts:
cuRobo + 2 cubes on pedestals:
1) UR10 base at (0, 0, 0.75). cuRobo planner with ur10e.yml.
2) Two pedestals at xy=(-0.5, 0.4) and (-0.5, 0.0). Each 15cm tall.
3) Two cubes on top at z=0.975. SOURCE_PATHS=[/World/Cube_1, /World/Cube_2].
4) Single bin at (0.5, -0.4, 0.75). Both cubes delivered there.
5) Tests cuRobo handler's S['picked_path'] iteration + raycast workaround.
6) Validates that cuRobo's _UR10_FJ_PATH single-cell holder cycles correctly across two cycle iterations (form FJ, transit, drop, remove FJ, form again for next cube).
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/UR10", prim_type="Xform")
add_reference(prim_path="/World/UR10", reference_path="/mnt/shared_data/isaac-sim-assets-complete-5.0.0/Assets/Isaac/5.0/Collected_Robots/ur10.usd")
teleport_prim(prim_path="/World/UR10", position=[0, 0, 0.75])

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Pedestal_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.5, 0.4, 0.875], scale=[0.06, 0.06, 0.075])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Pedestal_1", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Pedestal_2", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.5, 0.0, 0.875], scale=[0.06, 0.06, 0.075])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Pedestal_2", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.5, 0.4, 0.975], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=["/World/Cube_1"], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", material_name="rubber")

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_2", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.5, 0.0, 0.975], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_2", schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=["/World/Cube_2"], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_2", material_name="rubber")

create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[0.5, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.3, 0.3, 0.15])

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    robot_family="ur10",
    target_source="curobo",
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_1", "/World/Cube_2"],
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
    end_effector_offset=[0.0, 0.0, 0.02],
)
code_template:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path={{primary_robot.path}}, prim_type="Xform")
add_reference(prim_path={{primary_robot.path}}, reference_path="/mnt/shared_data/isaac-sim-assets-complete-5.0.0/Assets/Isaac/5.0/Collected_Robots/ur10.usd")
teleport_prim(prim_path={{primary_robot.path}}, position={{primary_robot.position}})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Pedestal_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.5, 0.4, 0.875], scale=[0.06, 0.06, 0.075])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Pedestal_1", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Pedestal_2", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.5, 0.0, 0.875], scale=[0.06, 0.06, 0.075])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Pedestal_2", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[0].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{workpieces[0].path}}, material_name="rubber")

create_prim(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, prim_type="Cube", position={{workpieces[1].position}}, size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=[{{workpieces[1].path}}], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path={{workpieces[1].path}}, material_name="rubber")

create_bin(prim_path={{primary_destination.path}}, position={{primary_destination.position}}, size={{primary_destination.size}})

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path={{primary_robot.path}},
    robot_family="ur10",
    target_source="curobo",
    source_paths=[{{workpieces[0].path}}, {{workpieces[1].path}}],
    destination_path={{primary_destination.path}},
    end_effector_offset=[0.0, 0.0, 0.02],
)
extension_notes: CP-83 = CP-69 stripped of conveyor + 2nd cube on pedestal. Tests cuRobo handler's UR10 raycast workaround across multi-cube cycles.
failure_modes: cuRobo planner re-init slow at start (uses existing cached planner v4 if present).
Raycast workaround for cuRobo uses S['picked_path'] which is sensor-driven; for sensor-less canonicals, _cube_to_pick() falls back to base proximity.
Same UR10 init quirks as CP-69.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-05-08; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✓ (UR10 cuRobo two-cube pedestal — Cube_1 delivered to bin via raycast workaround)
